title: Emissive Starry Ores
description: Makes ores gently glow and twinkle like stars without needing any mods
body:
Emissive Starry Ores

Works entirely in vanilla Minecraft

Emissive Starry Ores gives ores a star-like animation. Individual ore fragments brighten and dim at different times, creating a scattered twinkling effect.

## Features - No OptiFine / Continuity required 🚫 - Works with sodium - Animates individual ore fragments and pixels - Five randomly selected animation phases - Animation speed can be adjusted using an option mod ⚙️ ## Optional Mods Animation speed can be adjusted using the optional [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod. ![Animation Speed Slider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ea41d8fc7e820cd6c90ff4f6a79951b1c041ad7.jpeg)
Will ores from mods be supported? Support for ores from popular mods is planned for future updates.
